{"LastUpdate":"2026-07-14 22:10 UTC","Overview":{"ReportDate":"13 July 2026","ReportTime":"8:43 AM","ReportAnnouncements":"","ReportWhatsHappening":"

Whether you’re hitting the slopes, exploring the village or enjoying tobogganing at Windy Corner with Everest Sports, there’s plenty to experience this week.

We have a great lineup of events and activations, including Twilight Tuesdays, Thursday night fireworks, live music and après experiences throughout the resort.

Planning to go tobogganing? Book your Windy Corner session with Everest Sports here

Discover what’s happening across the village. Explore the What’s On page HERE

Hut","CrossCountryDescription":"Fair","CrossCountryGroomed":"Closed"}]},"CrossCountryMaintenance":{"CrossCountryReporterDate":"14 July 2026","CrossCountryComments":"Tonight we were able to get the big machine out on the trails, unfortunately conditions weren't with us, so we had to stay up high. We had a lot of nice snow drifts on McKay loop and Pretty Valley Road. Mt McKay summit road is looking good other than one small patchy area towards the top. High Plains Road has held up fairly well to the weather, the first 100 meters is a bit patchy, but after that is looking nicely covered. For our classic friends, sadly due to the wet conditions we chose not to set any tracks, so as to avoid creating water gullies. Hopefully everything dries out in the next day or so and we can get them sorted for you. ","CrossCountryConditions":"Soft","CrossCountryCover":"Fair","CrossCountryLastGroomed":"14 July 2026","CrossCountryTotalGroomed":"10","CrossCountryTotalGroomed24":"6"},"SlopeMaintenance":{"Comments":"","CubicMetersofSnow":"","CurrentStatus":"On","GroomerChoice":"-","LastUpdateDate":"05 July 2026","LastUpdateTime":"11:44 AM","AverageSnowMaking":"0"},"Parks":{"Park":[{"ParkName":"Castle Park","ParkDetail":"Ruined Castle","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Drover's Dream Park","ParkDetail":"Top of Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Panorama Park","ParkDetail":"Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"}]},"Patrol":{"PatrolDate":"14 July 2026","PatrolTime":"10:06 AM","PatrolNaturalSnowDepth":"38","PatrolFreshSnow":"0","PatrolVillageBowl":"40","PatrolSunValley":"44","PatrolNorthSide":"31","PatrolLastSnowFall":"13 July 2026","SeasonalSnowfallToDate":"","PatrolSnowCover":"More precipitation rolled through last night and temperatures weren't quite low enough to make it snow. We're still sitting on a 38cm base with plenty of good skiing to be had down wombats and in the Towers/Drovers area. With Eagle now open for the season we have access from the Village Bowl! Temperatures today are expected to be a high of 1 degree with snow likely above 1400m. Wind is predicted to be in the mid to low 20's, shouldn't have too much of an impact on lift status. Keep an eye on the app or website for changes to lift status and terrain. Have fun out there today, stay warm and stay safe! ","PatrolForecast":"Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely this evening. Snow falling above 1400 metres. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 7 and 14.","PatrolSnowChains":"Fitting on 2WD.
